title: YöL Pop Up Sun Shelter Pet Tent Dog Puppy Lightweight Beach Holiday Travel Cooling Shade Portable
features: SUMMER: It is essential that precautions are taken to ensure that your pet is kept cool during the hot summer days. Cooling aids such as cool mats and shelters are great for keeping their temperature down.
POP UP: Experience the magic as it effortlessly springs to life in mere seconds, eliminating the need for any cumbersome inflation methods, and saving you time and hassle during setup.
EASY: Crafted with convenience in mind, this portable marvel is designed to be intuitively user-friendly, ensuring that even novices can easily handle it with minimal effort.

STORAGE: When it's time to pack up, simply fold it flat for storage, allowing you to reclaim your space with ease. The carry bag, complete with sturdy handles, makes transporting this versatile companion a breeze, whether you're headed to the beach or on a camping trip.

SIZE: Measuring approximately 70 x 90 x 70cm, your pet will find ample room to relax and unwind, making it perfect for trips to the beach or simply enjoying a peaceful moment in your backyard sanctuary.
description: Product Description Pet Sun Shelter Summer It's crucial to take measures to ensure your pet stays cool amidst scorching summer days. Utilising cooling helps like cool mats and shelters can effectively regulate their temperature. Equipped with sturdy handles, the accompanying carry bag facilitates easy transportation of this versatile companion, whether it's a trip to the beach or a camping escapade.
